title: dactylorhiza × influenza
intro: Dactylorhiza × influenza, also known as the hybrid orchid or the influeuced spurge orchid, is a cross between two Dactylorhiza species and the Spiranthes species. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × influenza include its potential to treat symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antiseptic and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza × influenza are typically made by infusing the plant's roots or leaves in hot water, which can be used as a tea or tincture to leverage its medicinal properties.
